Michael I. Jordan

Directeur de Recherche
Inria and l'Ecole Normale Supérieure, Paris, France

Pehong Chen Distinguished Professor Emeritus
Department of EECS
Department of Statistics
CLIMB Center
Berkeley AI Research Lab
Sky Computing
University of California, Berkeley

Email: jordan@cs.berkeley.edu

Address:
387 Soda Hall #1776
University of California
Berkeley, CA 94720-1776

Grants Administrator:
Judy Tam
jtam@erso.berkeley.edu

Michael I. Jordan


Biographical highlights

  • Directeur de Recherche, Inria and l'Ecole Normale Supérieure, Paris, 2023-present
  • Distinguished Professor Emeritus, University of California, Berkeley, 2024-present
  • Professor, University of California, Berkeley, 1998-2024
  • Professor, MIT, 1988-1998
  • Docteur Honoris Causa, l'Institut Polytechnique de Paris, 2026
  • Honorary Doctorate, Yale University, 2020
  • Laureate Professor, Mohamed Bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence, 2020-present
  • Honorary Professor, Peking University, 2018-present
  • Distinguished Visiting Professor, Tsinghua University, 2017-2019
  • Chaire d'Excellence, Fondation Sciences Mathématiques de Paris, 2012
  • Foreign Member of the Royal Society
  • Foreign Member of the Chinese Academy of Sciences
  • Member, National Academy of Sciences
  • Member, National Academy of Engineering
  • Member, American Academy of Arts and Sciences
  • Member, Accademia di Ingegneria e Tecnologia (Italian Academy of Engineering and Technology)
  • Fellow, American Association for the Advancement of Science
  • Fellow of the AAAI, AAIA, ACM, ASA, CSS, IEEE, IMS, ISBA and SIAM
  • Elected Member, International Statistical Institute
  • Institute of Mathematical Statistics (IMS) Wald Memorial Award and Lecture, 2028
  • BBVA Foundation Frontiers of Knowledge Award in Information and Communication Technologies, 2025
  • International Congress of Basic Science (ICBS) Frontiers of Science Award (with John Duchi and Martin Wainwright), 2025
  • International Congress of Basic Science (ICBS) Frontiers of Science Award (with Yuchen Zhang, Mingsheng Long, Kaiyuan Chen, Lanxiang Xing, Ronghua Jin, and Jianmin Wang), 2025
  • Laureate Distinguished Fellow, International Engineering and Technology Institute, 2025
  • Academy Award, National Academy of Artificial Intelligence (NAAI), 2025
  • World Laureates Association (WLA) Prize, 2022
  • Institute of Mathematical Statistics (IMS) Grace Wahba Lecturer, 2022
  • American Mathematical Society (AMS) Ulf Grenander Prize in Stochastic Theory and Modeling, 2021
  • Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) John von Neumann Medal, 2020
  • Plenary Speaker, International Congress of Mathematicians, 2018
  • International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI) Research Excellence Award, 2016
  • David E. Rumelhart Prize, 2015
  • Institute of Mathematical Statistics (IMS) Neyman Lecture, 2011
  • Association for Computing Machinery/Association for the Advancement of Artificial Intelligence (ACM/AAAI) Allen Newell Award, 2009
  • Society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics (SIAM) Activity Group on Optimization Prize, 2008
  • Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) Neural Networks Pioneer Award, 2006
  • Institute of Mathematical Statistics (IMS) Medallion Lecture, 2004
  • Co-Founder, Anyscale Inc
  • Co-Founder, Arena Inc
  • Board Member, United Masters LLC
  • Full biography...

Publications
